It works on Plan basis for each product. The plan can be set for a day, week, month
The user journey would be like
User create an account with few details-> The user will have an option to add money to wallet with minimun Rs.500 - max Rs 2000
It should have a calender. Provide pause and resume functionaly for active plan. 
The active plan in account section should have start date and end date for the active plan.
